channel.title: 白泽 — 跨界技术建造者 · 金融 × 区块链 × AI
channel.description: 在金融、区块链、AI 的交叉点造产品。把复杂系统做到能上线——这里是我的项目、复盘，和能帮到你的东西。

item.title: Reading Liang Wenfeng, I Saw a Strength That Doesn't Contend
item.description: I read a transcript of Liang Wenfeng's investor Q&A and couldn't shake it — restraint, not contending, no complaints, and one line about work that made me want to loosen my own grip.

item.title: The Pipe Got Thinner, and I Felt Calmer
item.description: I pulled an all-nighter trying to burn through my Claude Code quota, only to find the pipe had been quietly pinched — and slowly understood: what wins you over is rarely more, it's control over the pace.

item.title: The Complete Failure of Sentiment NLP Factors on Meme Cryptos and Its Countermeasures
item.description: When AI sentiment models fail to predict even basic trend directions in meme cryptos, I adjusted the factor library accordingly.

item.title: A One-Person Company Looks Light. It's Heavier Than It Looks.
item.description: I watched a creator step into the spotlight in three months — and watched the light go out faster than it came on. So I pulled up a chair and looked closely at what those three months were hiding.

item.title: Whoever Moves First Becomes the Vendor
item.description: A partnership built on a handshake quietly died. It took me two months to see it wasn't that she changed — it's that every extra day I worked, I handed another inch of control away.

item.title: A 1,000-Yuan Tuition: The Things I Never Said Out Loud
item.description: An informal partnership with no contract fell apart. The expensive part wasn't the money — it was that I planned to raise her pay and send her bigger clients, and never said a word of it.

item.title: An Alternative Approach to Management Efficiency
item.description: How to transform resistance into management opportunities through task constraints rather than power struggles?

item.title: The Paradox of Thinking and the Relativity of Principles
item.description: Why do we pretend not to know truths we clearly understand?

item.title: A Product Is Grown: Walking Back My Faith in Full Handoff to AI
item.description: I used to think a clear goal handed to AI, no stops in between, results-only, was enough—until I noticed I was mass-producing industrial waste at a hundred times the speed.

item.title: When AI Erases the Middle, a Business Has Only Two Ends Left
item.description: Once AI drives the cost of production and execution toward zero, the real edge isn't in the middle—it's in attention and trust, the two ends no one can copy.
